nasb.text: So also is the resurrection of the dead. It is sown a perishable body, it is raised an imperishable body;

esv.text: So is it with the resurrection of the dead. What is sown is perishable; what is raised is imperishable.

cnv.text: 死人復活也是這樣。所種的是必朽壞的，復活的是不朽壞的；

ccb.text: 死人复活也是同样的道理。种下去的会朽坏，复活的不会朽坏；

csbs.text: 死人的复活也是这样： 在衰朽中被种下，在不朽中复活；
